SessionStart.description: Create artifacts directories and print session context on start

hooks.command: mkdir -p artifacts/specs artifacts/requirements artifacts/contracts artifacts/plans artifacts/tests artifacts/code artifacts/reports && echo '=== SuperJeff session started ===' && echo 'Artifacts directory: ready' && echo 'Instincts loaded: django.yaml | security.yaml | testing.yaml' && echo 'Run /superjeff:brainstorm to start a new feature'

SessionStart.description: Detect Python/Django environment and print active context

hooks.command: python --version 2>/dev/null && ([ -f manage.py ] && echo 'Django project detected: manage.py found' || echo 'No Django project in current directory') && ([ -f requirements.txt ] || [ -f requirements-dev.txt ] && echo 'Requirements file found' || echo 'No requirements file found')

PreToolUse.description: Block git --no-verify bypass of pre-commit hooks

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Fix the underlying issue instead.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block force push to main or master branch

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force.*(main|master)|git push.*-f.*(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push to main/master is not allowed.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block hardcoded secrets in any Python or config file

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'secret_key\s*=\s*["\'\x27][A-Za-z0-9]|password\s*=\s*["\'\x27][A-Za-z0-9]|api_key\s*=\s*["\'\x27][A-Za-z0-9]|token\s*=\s*["\'\x27][A-Za-z0-9]{10}'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Hardcoded secret detected. Load from environment variables instead.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block eval() and exec() in generated Python code

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^[^#]*eval\(|^[^#]*exec\('; then echo 'BLOCKED: eval()/exec() detected. This is a security violation per instincts/security.yaml.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn on raw SQL queries in Python files — ORM required per Django rules

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.raw\(|cursor\.execute\('; then echo 'WARNING: Raw SQL detected. Use the Django ORM. If raw SQL is intentional, ensure it uses parameterized queries and add a comment: # raw-sql-approved'; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block Class-Based Views and ViewSets — FBV only per Django rules

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'class [A-Z][a-zA-Z]*(APIView|View)\(|class [A-Z][a-zA-Z]*ViewSet\(|ModelViewSet|ReadOnlyModelViewSet'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Class-Based View or ViewSet detected. Use Function-Based Views with @api_view decorator only. See instincts/django.yaml.' && exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "fields = '__all__'|fields = \"__all__\""; then echo 'BLOCKED: fields = __all__ is not allowed in serializers. Always list fields explicitly. See instincts/django.yaml.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: On git commit: verify no print() statements and confirm commit message has correct format

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then PRINT_COUNT=$(grep -rn '^[^#]*print(' apps/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v test | wc -l); if [ "$PRINT_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "WARNING: $PRINT_COUNT print() statement(s) found in non-test code. Replace with logging."; fi; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn before modifying Django settings files

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'config/settings/(base|production)\.py'; then echo 'WARNING: Modifying production/base settings. Ensure SECRET_KEY, DEBUG, ALLOWED_HOSTS load from environment variables only.'; fi

PostToolUse.description: Validate JSON files written to artifacts/ are well-formed

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH" | grep -q 'artifacts/'; then python -m json.tool "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Invalid JSON written to $CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH — check schema compliance"; fi

PostToolUse.description: After model file edits, remind to run makemigrations

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'models\.py' && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'Write|Edit'; then echo 'REMINDER: models.py was modified. Run: python manage.py makemigrations <app>'; fi

PostToolUse.description: Append all bash commands to session audit log

Stop.description: Back up pipeline state JSON on session end

hooks.command: if [ -f artifacts/pipeline_state.json ]; then cp artifacts/pipeline_state.json artifacts/pipeline_state.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).bak && echo 'Pipeline state backed up.'; fi

Stop.description: Remind to run tests if Python files were modified this session

hooks.command: MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$' | grep -v migrations | wc -l); if [ "$MODIFIED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Session ended with $MODIFIED modified Python file(s). Run: pytest --tb=short -q"; fi

Stop.description: Print a summary of artifacts produced this session

hooks.command: echo '=== SuperJeff session summary ===' && echo 'Specs:' $(ls artifacts/specs/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && echo 'Plans:' $(ls artifacts/plans/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && echo 'Reports:' $(ls artifacts/reports/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && echo 'Audit log:' $(wc -l < artifacts/bash-audit.log 2>/dev/null || echo 0) 'commands logged'

PreCompact.description: Save pipeline state before context compaction so it survives the compact

hooks.command: if [ -f artifacts/pipeline_state.json ]; then cp artifacts/pipeline_state.json artifacts/pipeline_state.pre-compact.json && echo 'State saved before compaction.'; fi
